title: BEIJINGGG — Beijing 4-day itinerary (Nov 2024)
html:
TL;DR

  • Nov 14-17, 2024 Beijing itinerary built from Shanghai during the CIEE study abroad fall — co-planned with a friend (collaborative tone in the doc).
  • Day 1 (Thu): arrival via Beijing South Railway → hotel → Wangfujing Street → Quanjude for the canonical Beijing Duck.
  • Day 2 (Fri): Tiananmen Square (free, wechat mini-program ticket) → Forbidden City (20 yuan student, reservation 1wk advance) → Jingshan Park → Gulou nanluoguxiang Michelin soy bean noodles → Shichahai night-walk.
  • Day 3 (Sat): Mutianyu Great Wall — shuttle 80 yuan from Qianmen Exit C, lift+slide+entry 140 yuan via alipay, shrimp hotpot at Bashu Wangpo on return.
  • Day 4 (Sun): Summer Palace (Trip.com booking) → Beijing daxue → xiangshan gongyuan → Sanlitun shopping → Din Tai Fung dimsum → train to Shanghai Hongqiao.
  • Logistics doc — pricing in yuan, wechat/alipay payment routing, advance-reservation flagging. Practical not narrative.

Notes

A working trip itinerary, not a journal — sister artifact to earlier Shanghai journals but operational rather than reflective. Key signal: by November Yahir was logistically fluent enough in mainland China travel to plan a multi-stop Beijing trip with wechat mini-program ticketing and alipay payments — the China chapter's payments-rail competence is on display.

The food density is notable: Quanjude duck, Bashu Wangpo shrimp hotpot, Din Tai Fung, Michelin Gulou noodles. Yahir was running a comparative anthropology food survey alongside the monument tour.

The "Grandma~~" line near Sanlitun is a person-reference (likely a host's grandma offering home-cooked Beijing cuisine) but ambiguous — flagged for densify if the relationship surfaces elsewhere.

This is the closest the vault has to a real Beijing-trip artifact (vs. just discussing China abstractly). Slots between Sept arrival and the mid-2025 reflections about what China taught him.

Connections

  • china chapter · shanghai study abroad · the china chapter as comparative anthropology — the chapter
  • beijing · tiananmen square · forbidden city · great wall · summer palace — places visited
  • wechat · alipay — payment / ticketing rails
  • 2024 09 11 thoughts and things 9112024 — same-semester Shanghai context

Privacy

  • No PII. Map link retained (public Google Maps share).
